CustomField.description: To display data from the contract scope field here in the cross function object realted list
CustomField.formula: IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"ASLS_Reagents"),"ASLS_Reagents: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"ASLS_Instruments"),"ASLS_Instruments: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"ASLS_Consumables"),"ASLS_Consumables: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"LST_Reagents"),"LST_Reagents: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"LST_Instruments"),"LST_Instruments: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"LST_Consumables"),"LST_Consumables: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"GS_Reagents"),"GS_Reagents: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"GS_Instruments"),"GS_Instruments: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"GS_Consumables"),"GS_Consumables: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"SDx_Reagents"),"SDx_Reagents: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"SDx_Instruments"),"SDx_Instruments: ","")& IF(includes( Contract_Relationship_1__r.Scope__c ,"SDx_Consumables"),"SDx_Consumables: ","")
CustomField.label: Scope
